latest.title: Climbers on Cotopaxi don’t stand on the summit
latest.script_key: watch this one twice those tiny dots on cotopaxi aren t climbers standing on the very top they re on a flat patch 20 meters below the true summit ridge because the ice is too thin and sloped to stand on that s why rescue teams mark the safe zone with orange poles

latest.title: Dogs read human pointing surprisingly well
latest.script_key: dogs can follow a human point fast watch the eyes check the person because dogs are unusually good at using human gestures that skill helps them cooperate with us before any command gets repeated the small glance is social intelligence not random obedience what dog skill should come next

latest.title: Mountains aren’t fixed forever like you learned
latest.script_key: watch this ridge those sharp edges weren t always here glaciers carved them into knife blades and rock keeps crumbling off every rain drop counts just one cubic centimeter of granite can dissolve in a year that s why peaks look young today and gone tomorrow did you learn they last forever

latest.title: Volcanic craters hide a surprising coastal trick
latest.script_key: you re standing inside one right now and don t realize it that scenic coastal path it s actually a volcanic crater rim the cliffs you re walking on are made of ash that fell flat the ocean below looks calm because the crater eats the waves before they hit

latest.title: Mountains breathe through slow-motion avalanches
latest.script_key: this peak is alive see those white veins they re not snow they re rock dust sliding off like a slow sneeze because frost pries the mountain apart overnight that s why jagged peaks stay sharp instead of rounding off ever stepped on crumbly granite you re walking on avalanches in progress

latest.title: Zebras aren't just striped they're invisible to flies
latest.script_key: zebras aren t just striped they re invisible to flies watch their stripes move in sharp zigzags that s why flies can t land straight their eyes glitch on the pattern no wonder they bunch up it s the world s fanciest fly swatter did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Lava flows aren't red just because they're hot
latest.script_key: this isn t red hot lava that s just the camera lying to us what you re seeing is indigo fermentation iron in the rock glowing as it cools the camera overexposes the real color which is closer to dull orange that s why we think lava s red our eyes get fooled
